positive: A minimalist and sophisticated celestial landscape featuring a strong, central crescent moon above stylized geometric constellations and gentle nebulae washes. The color palette is restricted to deep midnight blues, cosmic purples, and glowing accents of ethereal cyan and soft gold. The design must use clean, thick-lined silhouettes for the zodiac elements and stars, achieving a high-contrast, graphic, vintage astronomical map aesthetic. Ideal for repeat placement on fabric. Vector illustration style, highly stylized, centered composition, perfect symmetry, clean edges, flat graphic design, suitable for screen printing.
